case_title: AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK VS. ALLYSON JOFFRION et al

docket_entries.description: RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT JOFFRION, ALLYSON

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOFFRION, ALLYSON $9,064.85 PRINCIPAL, $345.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $9,409.85, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
DECLARATION WAIVER OF INTEREST & ATTORNEY'S FEES FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
NOT FOUND OR NO SERVICE RETURN ATTEMPTING SERVICE OF SUMMONS AND COMPLAINT ON DEFENDANT, ALLYSON JOFFRION ON DEC-02-2012 FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN DIEGO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, PARTIALLY SATISFIED IN THE SUM OF $76.67 AS TO DEFENDANT JOFFRION, ALLYSON
COST BILL AFTER JUDGMENT, $.00 CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED, $172.86 INTEREST, $.00 COSTS FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT JOFFRION, ALLYSON
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $345.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 AS TO DEFENDANT JOFFRION, ALLYSON
DECLARATION FOR REIMBURSEMENT OF COSTS [CCP 1033] FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK
DECLARATION /AFFIDAVIT IN SUPPORT OF APPLICATION FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT JUDGMENT (CCP 585) FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK AS TO DEFENDANT JOFFRION, ALLYSON DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL. SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-20-2013
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF AMERICAN EXPRESS CENTURION BANK SERVED MAR-17-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT JOFFRION, ALLYSON
DISMISSAL WITHOUT PREJUDICE OF COMPLAINT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 THRU 15, INCL.
EXECUTION FOR MONEY ISSUED TO SAN DIEGO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT JOFFRION, ALLYSON
